name: JEWETT CAMERON TRADING CO LTD
summary: Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd. is a British Columbia-incorporated holding company operating through U.S. subsidiaries. It designs, sources, and distributes pet, fencing, and outdoor products (including patented Adjust-A-Gate and Fit-Right gate systems) under JCC; distributes specialty industrial wood products for transportation via Greenwood Products; and formerly processed agricultural seed through JCSC. Total sales were $41.3 million in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Adjust-A-Gate
products.description: Patented gate support system for wood, vinyl, chain link, and composite fences.

products.name: Fit-Right
products.description: Patented gate support system for various fence types.

products.name: Industrial Wood Products
products.description: Specialty wood products for municipal and mass transit transportation sectors distributed by Greenwood.

products.name: Agricultural Seed
products.description: Seed processing and distribution; operations ended August 31, 2023.
